name: Obsidian Sync
description: Obsidian Sync — keeps a local vault copy in sync for agent read/write access
author: Streamliner One

accountEmail.label: Account email
accountEmail.help: Obsidian account email used for Sync login.

accountPassword.label: Account password
accountPassword.help: Stored securely in the tools vault. Used to auto-login; OTP still manual when 2FA is enabled.

vaultPath.label: Local vault path
vaultPath.help: Optional. If blank, the server will auto-create and manage a safe vault directory. If set, must be within the allowed vault base dir.

remoteVault.label: Remote vault (name or id)
remoteVault.help: Optional. Used for setup hints and clearer validation messages.

e2ePassword.label: E2E encryption password
e2ePassword.help: Only needed if the remote vault is end-to-end encrypted.

deviceName.label: Device name
deviceName.help: Shows up in Obsidian Sync version history.

configDir.label: Config dir name
configDir.help: Obsidian config folder inside the vault (default: .obsidian).

skill.useWhen: obsidian notes, vault search, synced notes, markdown notes, personal knowledge base, obsidian vault
skill.note: Keeps a local vault copy in sync for agent read/write access.
